hooks.command: bash -c "if echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | grep -qiE '(rm -rf|drop table|drop database|truncate|DELETE FROM.*WHERE 1|DELETE FROM.*WHERE true)'; then echo '{\"decision\": \"block\", \"reason\": \"Destructive command detected. Requires explicit user approval before execution.\"}'; else echo '{\"decision\": \"allow\"}'; fi"

bash -c "LINT_OUTPUT=$(npm run lint 2>&1); LINT_EXIT=$?; TSC_OUTPUT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); TSC_EXIT=$?; if [ $LINT_EXIT -ne 0 ] || [ $TSC_EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '{\"ok\": false, \"reason\": \"Code quality gate failed. Fix lint/type errors before completing task.\n'"$LINT_OUTPUT"'\n'"$TSC_OUTPUT"'\"}'; else echo '{\"ok\": true}'; fi"
